data.title: Groupe Rocher and Dassault Systèmes Embark on New Collaboration to Transform Natural Cosmetics Formulation Through Virtual Twin Technology
data.description: In Velizy-Villacoublay, France, Dassault Systèmes (Euronext Paris: FR0014003TT8, DSY.PA) and Groupe Rocher, a French natural cosmetics pioneer founded in 1959, have partnered to enhance Groupe Rocher’s research and development using virtual twins. Virtual twins are cutting-edge science-based technologies that have demonstrated success across various sectors. Groupe Rocher, a family-owned business, is renowned for its longstanding commitment to producing natural, effective, and socially responsible beauty products.

data.title: American Bankers Association disputes White House report on stablecoin yields, fears mass deposit outflows from smaller banks.
data.description: The American Bankers Association has voiced worries about stablecoin interest rates causing significant withdrawals of deposits from smaller community banks.
Polish central banker Kotecki says he sees no room for further interest rate cuts this year, media reports.
The Philippines has requested an extension from the U.S. on its waiver to buy Russian oil and petroleum products, the energy secretary said.

data.title: The 139th Canton Fair to Open on April 15 with Expanded Scale and Stronger Innovation Focus
data.description: The upcoming 139th China Import and Export Fair (Canton Fair) is scheduled to take place in Guangzhou from April 15 to May 5, 2026. The fair will be split into three phases and is expected to encompass a massive exhibition space of 1.55 million square meters, hosting a staggering total of 75,700 booths.

data.title: Will Iran End Uranium Enrichment Once And For All? Crypto Prediction Market Is Raising Odds
data.description: Speculation in the cryptocurrency market has surged regarding the possibility of Iran ceasing uranium enrichment, following reports of the nation's willingness to suspend its nuclear activity. The Polymarket platform, based on Polygon (CRYPTO: POL), now indicates a 41% likelihood of Iran ending uranium enrichment by the end of June, a significant increase from 20% the previous day. Furthermore, the odds of this scenario occurring before the year concludes have risen by 14 percentage points to 47%. With over $1 million in bets placed on the outcome, an "official pledge" from Iran to halt all uranium enrichment would result in a "Yes" resolution. Additionally, the chances of Iran agreeing to relinquish its enriched uranium stockpile by the year's end have also escalated. The complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
Report on weekly progress: Buyback program advancing to cover share plans, aiming to reduce capital.

data.title: AS LHV Group webinar on Q1 2026 financial results
data.description: LHV Group is hosting a webinar on 21 April at 11:00 EET to unveil their unverified financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2026. All investors and interested individuals are encouraged to join. The webinar will be presented in English.

data.title: TGS Awarded Offshore Wind Site Characterization Contract
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on April 14, 2026, TGS, a renowned provider of energy data and intelligence, secured a contract for offshore wind site characterization in Europe. The Ramform Vanguard will initiate data acquisition in late July, with the contract lasting about 1.5 months.

data.title: Rules limiting foreign firms from relocating supply chains from China raise concerns among multinationals for possible penalties under new regulations.
data.description: International corporations operating in China are expressing worries about the regulations that could potentially lead to penalties for companies and executives if they decide to relocate their supply chains out of the country.

data.title: Netflix head Ted Sarandos makes rare move, attends major movie theater conference, meets with domestic and international owners.
data.description: Ted Sarandos made his debut at a prominent film industry gathering, where he engaged with both national and global theater proprietors. Insiders revealed that this was the first time he participated in such an event.
